data.title: Bitcoin drops 5%, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin fall 6% with crypto liquidations surpassing $1 billion. Bitcoin hits low at $103,856. ETFs witness net outflows - BTC $536.4 million, ETH $56.9 million. Traders predict solid buy orders between $100,000 and $104,000.
data.description: Bitcoin dropped to a low of $103,856 on Friday, leading to a significant increase in liquidations totaling $1.19 billion within the last 24 hours. Concurrently, spot BTC ETFs experienced net outflows of $536.4 million on Thursday, while ETH ETFs saw net outflows of $56.9 million. Market analyst Ted Pillows pointed out strong buy orders for Bitcoin ranging from $100,000 to $104,000 on Binance. Pillows anticipates bullish investors to defend this price zone, suggesting a potential retest to fill the previous week's wick and establish a robust support level for future movements. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Interfor will reduce lumber production in Q4 2025 due to weak market conditions; operations impacted across BC, Ontario, US.
data.description: In Burnaby, British Columbia, on October 17, 2025, the INTERFOR CORPORATION, trading as TSX: IFP, shared updates on its fourth quarter operational strategies. Amid a challenging market environment and economic instability, Interfor has decided to implement additional temporary cutbacks in lumber production. These reductions will impact operations in British Columbia, Ontario, the US Pacific Northwest, and the US South. The company aims to navigate through the tough conditions by adjusting production in response to the ongoing uncertainties.

data.title: Trust is essential for leadership success. Demonstrating reliability is key. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: To be a successful leader, it is crucial to earn people's trust by following through on promises. Demonstrating reliability and integrity is key in gaining the confidence of others. This principle is paramount in leadership and is a cornerstone to being an effective and respected figure. By consistently delivering on commitments and showing accountability, leaders can build strong relationships and inspire loyalty among their followers. Trust is the foundation of successful leadership, and it is vital for leaders to uphold their word to maintain this trust.

data.title: Autoliv reports record Q3 2025: $2.7 billion sales, 5.9% increase, $2.28 EPS, 9.9% operating margin.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, a company based in Stockholm achieved remarkable financial results, setting new records. The highlights include $2,706 million in net sales, marking a 5.9% increase compared to the previous period. The organic sales growth stood at 3.9%. The operating margin reached 9.9%, while the adjusted operating margin was at 10.0%. The diluted earnings per share (EPS) were $2.28, showing a significant increase of 31% compared to the same quarter in the previous year.

data.title: Dow Jones futures recover after bank fears, Oracle and Interactive Brokers slide. Regional banks led Thursday's market sell-off.
data.description: After experiencing a market sell-off led by regional banks, futures dropped but recovered slightly before closing. Stocks of Interactive Brokers and Oracle took a hit following recent news. Dow Jones Futures initially decreased amid concerns about the banking sector but managed to reduce losses. Notably, Oracle and Interactive Brokers registered a decline in their stock prices.

data.title: Caledonia Mining Corp. notified of change as investor's aggregate shareholding falls below 3%.
data.description: In a recent announcement from St Helier, Jersey, on October 17, 2025, the Caledonia Mining Corporation Plc revealed that Allan Gray Bermuda Limited (“AGBL”) has informed them that its clients' combined shareholding now holds less than 3% of the total issued shares in the Company. This indicates a significant decrease in ownership interest by AGBL's clients.

data.title: Wrap introduces DFR-X™, a non-lethal drone solution turning drones into active responders with controlled non-lethal capability.
data.description: A company has introduced a new product named DFR-X™, which is a non-lethal drone payload designed to convert drones from passive observers to active responders. This innovative technology provides drones with controlled, non-lethal capabilities for various applications.

data.title: UCLOUDLINK GROUP INC. sets up new structure for pet-tech business with Cayman Islands-based holding company within UCLOUDLINK to support global expansion.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 17, 2025, UCLOUDLINK GROUP INC., listed as (NASDAQ: UCL), a prominent mobile data traffic sharing marketplace, revealed its plan to restructure its pet-tech business. The company's board of directors sanctioned the proposal to establish a new operational framework. This strategy involves the integration of a Cayman Islands-centered holding company, herein referred to as the "New Company," under UCLOUDLINK. The New Company will be reinforced by local operating subunits to lay the groundwork for the pet-tech business on a worldwide scale.
